item.unit: mill t CO2 equ. per annum

table.name: Key indicators, scenario comparison, line chart

item.itemName: SDG1 No poverty: Income of poorest household (S)
SDG2 Zero hunger: Minimum calories supply to any household (S)
SDG2 Zero hunger: Minimum protein supply to any household (S)
item.unit: gr Protein per cap and day

item.itemName: SDG3 Good health and well being: exposed air emissions (S)
item.unit: PMFT emitted, cululative over five years

item.itemName: SDG3 Good health and well being: domestic consumption of health and social services (S)
SDG3 Good health and well being: share of domestic consumption of health and social services (S)
SDG4 Quality education: domestic consumption of educational services (S)
SDG4 Quality education: share of domestic consumption of educational services (S)
SDG5 Gender equality: Sahre of female wages on total (S)
SDG6: Clean water and sanitation: Household per capital consumption of water services (B)
SDG7 Affordable and clean energy: Household energy price index (S)
SDG7 Affordable and clean energy: GHG emission intensity of power generation (S)
SDG8 Decent work and economic growth: Real GDP per capita (E)
SDG9 Industry, innovation and infrastructure: Construction demand by government per capita (E)
SDG9 Industry, innovation and infrastructure: Economy wide demand for information and communication per capita (E)
SDG9 Industry, innovation and infrastructure: Contribution of industry to Value Added (E)
SDG10 Reduced inequality: Contribution of labor to Value Added (E)
SDG11 Sustainable cities and communities: GHG emissions per capita (S)
SDG11 Sustainable cities and communities: Built-up land per capita (S)
SDG12 Responsible consumption and production: GHG emission intensity of GDP (S)
SDG12 Economy-wide consumption of fossil energy per capita (S)
SDG12 Irrigation water use per unit of output of irrigated activities (S)
SDG14 Life below water: Natural resource use in fisheries (B)
SDG15 Life on land: Loss of natural vegetation (B)
SDG16 Peace, Justice and Strong institutions: Government debt over GDP (S)
SDG16 Peace, Justice and Strong institutions: Public administration supply per cap (S)
